name: Cloudflare
tagline: Powering the next generation of applications.
summary: Cloudflare, Inc. is an American technology company headquartered in San Francisco, California, that provides a range of internet services, including content delivery network (CDN) services, cloud cybersecurity, DDoS mitigation, and ICANN-accredited domain registration. Founded in 2009, Cloudflare has grown to serve approximately 21.3% of all websites on the Internet as of January 2026, and has integrated artificial intelligence into its infrastructure to enhance its offerings.

facts.label: Market Reach
facts.value: 21.3% of all websites on the Internet as of January 2026

strengths: Strong market presence with 21.3% of websites using its services
Diverse range of services including CDN, DDoS mitigation, and cybersecurity
Integration of AI into its infrastructure
weaknesses: Negative operating and net income in 2025
Controversies regarding content neutrality and service termination
threats: Intense competition in the cloud services market
Potential legal challenges related to content moderation

sources.title: Cloudflare: Build for the agent era
